title: Khushaal Chendu Kushal
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: Hajari
subTitle: A rat killer appointed by the local municipality sets out to work every night. Because of his nocturnal profession, a crack starts appearing in his married life.

title: Fillers
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Bogda
subTitle: An aspiring dancer takes her mother, who is terminally ill, to a village where she wishes to spend her last few days. During the journey, they explore new places and make unexpected memories.

title: Patanjali Yog by Yog Rishi Swami Ramdev
subTitle: Renowned Indian spiritual leader Swami Ramdev delivers demonstrations of various yoga poses and exercises for a healthy life.

title: Raakhandaar
subTitle: Sadanand, a poor worker, never fails to have faith in God. When he loses his job, his strong faith in God saves him and opens up better opportunities for him.

title: Majhya Navryachi Bayko
subTitle: A middle-class man lives honestly until his wife hears a sage's prediction about having a daughter and becoming rich. She pressures him to marry another woman, causing conflict in their simple life.

title: Swarajya Rakshak Sambhaji
subTitle: Sambhaji Maharaj confronts numerous obstacles as heir to the Maratha throne. Soon, he fights valiantly against Mughal invasions while managing internal conflicts and resource constraints.

title: Aamhi Saare Khavayye-Jodit Godi
subTitle: Contestant pairs cook flavorful dishes in a lively kitchen challenge, combining teamwork, creativity and traditional tastes while judges sample, critique and celebrate rich Marathi cuisine.

title: Agadbam
subTitle: Najuka's father arranges her marriage to his friend's son, Raiba. However, upon meeting Najuka, Raiba appears uncomfortable and maintains a distance from her.

title: Khulta Kali Khulena
subTitle: Vikrant and Monica's troubled marriage unfolds with secrets, lies, and a dramatic fight for their unborn daughter Isha.

title: Mr & Mrs Sadachari
subTitle: Shiva, a headstrong boy, falls in love with Gargi, who is his best friend's sister. However, a huge fight between them creates rifts in their relationship.

title: Hee Anokhi Gaath
subTitle: The sudden death of a man's fiancee pushes her unwilling sister into the role of his wife. But as he discovers the truth about her acting aspirations and previous lover, he sets out to reconnect them.

title: Swarajya Rakshak Sambhaji
subTitle: Sambhaji Maharaj, inspired by his father Shivaji, bravely fights for Swaraj's freedom against the Mughals. His success in this freedom war remains uncertain.
